calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement (Per Dept. 206)
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 to Place as Settlement on the record.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Ross McLauran Madden, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Clarissia Doss.
Petitioner Clarissia Doss present in court.
Hope C. Elder, Esq., appearing for Respondents Denolia Eves and Ronald Eves.
Respondents Denolia Eves and Ronald Eves present in court.

Terms and conditions of Settlement read into the record.
Court adjourned.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sufi Hariri specially appeared for Attorney Ross Madden for and with Clarissia Doss. Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Denolia Eves.

Counsel represented to the Court that mediation was unsuccessful and that no further discovery will be conducted. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Continued To May-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Clarissia Doss (Petitioner). Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Denolia Eves.

Counsel reported that mediation was held and was unsuccessful. Mr. Madden stated that his Client is trying to qualify to make an offer, that they need a couple more weeks and that he would like the trial to remain in Probate. Ms. Elder stated that she did not know if they could a trial in two half days. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was continued to May 13, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel are to work on narrowing down the issues. Ms. Elder may appear by telephone.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Continued To Apr-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Continued To Jan-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Petitioner. Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Respondents.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 24, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 31, 2012. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was continued to and the Parties are to return on January 7, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. Ms. Elder will appear by Court Call.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Continued To Nov-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Clarissia Doss (Petitioner). Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Responding Party.

Status on the Petition To Determine Existence of Trust was continued to November 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Madden to conduct written discovery on the new entering responding Party, two depositions and to determine if the Parties will proceed with Pro Bono Mediation. Ms. Elder stated that she now represents the new Party. Ms. Elder will appear by telephone at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens, Supporting Declaration Of Denolia Eves And Supporting Memorandum
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Text Ruling

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Continued To Aug-27-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens, Supporting Declaration Of Denolia Eves And Supporting Memorandum
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Continued To Jul-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Motion To Amend Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Text Ruling

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Continued To Jul-16-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Clarissia Doss. Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Denolia Eves.

Mr. Madden stated that they have done some discovery, that they had subtle discussion about settlement, that his Client has a problem with loans that were taken out by the Respondnet on two of the Trust properties for purchase of another property in Roseville, and that the property is not in the Trust and in the name of Mr. Eves (Respondent's Husband). In addition, Mr. Madden stated that he will file a motion to amend the petition to plead a cause of action of elder abuse and inlcude Mr. Eves' name. Ms. Elder stated that the property in Fairfield is either going into foreclosure or going to be sold. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was continued to July 16, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status. Ms. Elder will appear by telephone.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Continued To May-14-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Clarissia Doss (Petitioner). Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Respondent.

Counsel advised the Court that they have conducted some discovery, that they still need to do some discovery, that they are talking about possible resolution and agreed to a continuance. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was continued to May 14, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status. Ms. Elder will appear by telephone.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Mar-12-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Clarissia Doss. Hope Elder appeared by telephone for Denolia Eves.

Ms. Elder raised the issue of venue. The Parties will conduct discovery. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust was continued to March 12, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery. Ms. Elder will appear by telephone.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Petitioner. Hope Elder (by Court Call) for Respondent.

Discussion held on status of the case. The Court indicated a Response to the Petition is needed. Ms. Elder will file a Response and a Motion to Change of Venue within 15 days. The matter was continued to December 12, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status to set for trial. Ms. Elder will appear by Court Call.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Continued To Nov-07-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden and Sufi Hariri for and with Clarisia Doss. Denolia Eves in Proper Persona. Deborah Frye in Propria Persona.

Ms. Eves stated that her Attorney Hope Elder was not able to appear today. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust and the Stauts Hearing was continued to November 7, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Elder to appear, to see when a response will be filed and to pick a date for an evidentiary hearing.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Continued To Nov-07-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Continued To Oct-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Continued To Oct-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Continued To Oct-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Clarissia Doss (Petitioner). Joselyn Gunter (Interested Party) present in pro per. David Gunter (Interested Party) present in pro per.

The Court stated that Denolia Eves was the only person missing at the hearing. Mr. Madden stated that he was just handed an objection/request for dismissal this morning, that he had not previously seen it, that it is dated this past Saturday, and that supposedly it is from Ms. Eves. In addition, Mr. Madden presented his concerns with regard to the document noting that after a cursory look that it doesn't revoke the trust that they are here petitioning about, that the document appears to have been executed the day before Mr. Galloway died, that it purports to assign to this new trust the same assets that were already in the "93" trust, and that it appears that an evidentiary hearing is needed. The Court stated that it would issue a notice to appear to Ms. Eves for October 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to ascertain as to whether or not the response was filed and for setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
